task.objective: Create visual timeline showing test execution duration and status with parallel test visualization.

database_changes.note: No database migrations required - uses existing test results data

frontend.integration:
import { TestTimeline } from "./test-timeline"; import { TestGantt } from "./test-gantt"; // Add as a new tab:
// Add tab trigger: Timeline

endpoint.response: { "execution_id": 123, "total_duration_ms": 125000, "tests": [ { "id": 1, "test_name": "should login successfully", "test_file": "tests/auth.spec.ts", "status": "passed", "duration_ms": 1500, "started_at": "2025-12-25T10:00:00Z", "completed_at": "2025-12-25T10:00:01.5Z", "is_flaky": false, "is_critical": false, "error_message": null } ], "parallel_groups": [[/* tests that ran in parallel */]] }

prompt.visual_example:
The timeline visualizes tests like this:
Test Name Duration Bar ───────────────────────────────────────── should login ████████ 2.5s should add to cart ████████████████ 5.2s should checkout ██████████████████████ 8.1s should view order ████ 1.2s should logout ██ 0.5s │ └── Average: 3.5s

rollback.note: No database changes to rollback. Remove created files.

project_complete.summary: All 14 phases documented and ready for implementation

phases.phase: Test Signatures and Search - Foundation for tracking
Flaky Test Detection - Identify unreliable tests
Error Pattern Grouping - Cluster similar errors
Test Explorer - Most Failing - Reliability analysis
